ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drinks" (
  "drink_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drink */,
  "drink_name" TEXT /* Name of the drink */,
  "drink_type" TEXT /* Type of the drink (e.g., Cocktail, Soft Drink) */,
  "abv" REAL /* Alcohol by volume percentage of the drink */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Cost to produce one unit of the drink */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Retail price of the drink */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the drink was last produced */,
  "best_before_date" TEXT /* Best before date for the drink */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the drink is produced */,
  "bottling_location" TEXT /* Location where the drink is bottled */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the drink in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drink_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alcohols" (
  "booze_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alcoholic ingredient */,
  "booze_name" TEXT /* Name of the alcoholic ingredient */,
  "booze_type" TEXT /* Type of the alcoholic ingredient (e.g., Vodka, Whiskey) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the ingredient */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Cost to produce one unit of the alcohol */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Retail price of the alcohol */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the alcohol was last produced */,
  "best_before_date" TEXT /* Best before date for the alcohol */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the alcohol is produced */,
  "bottling_location" TEXT /* Location where the alcohol is bottled */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the alcohol in days */,
  "abv" REAL /* Alcohol by volume percentage of the alcohol */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booze_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alcohols_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ingredient relationship */,
  "drink_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drink associated with the ingredient */,
  "booze_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alcoholic ingredient */,
  "value" REAL /* Quantity of the ingredient used in the drink */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the ingredient */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost of one unit of the ingredient */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measurement */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the ingredient */,
  "supplier_batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number from the supplier */,
  "quality_certificate" TEXT /* Reference to the quality certificate provided by the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_drink_id FOREIGN KEY ("drink_id") REFERENCES drinks ("drink_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ingredients_booze_id FOREIGN KEY ("booze_id") REFERENCES alcohols ("booze_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the supplier based on performance */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for delivery from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "drink_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drink from the inventory */,
  "quantity_available" REAL /* Quantity available in inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse where the drink is stored */,
  "minimum_stock_level" REAL /* Minimum stock level to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" REAL /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level falls below the minimum */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the last reorder was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the next order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_drink_id FOREIGN KEY ("drink_id") REFERENCES drinks ("drink_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "drink_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drink sold */,
  "quantity_sold" REAL /* Quantity of the drink sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the sale */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  "is_returned" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the sale has been returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_drink_id FOREIGN KEY ("drink_id") REFERENCES drinks ("drink_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the role */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
